title: onosma ghahremanii
intro: Onosma ghahremanii, also known as Ghahremanii Onosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to Iran and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to contain various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as pain relief and reduced inflammation. Onosma ghahremanii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
